text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Mejiro Dober's debut, and Mejiro
Bright, Mejiro Ryan, and Air Groove have all
come to show their support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to meet the expectations of her loved
ones, Mejiro Dober heads into her debut race
burning with determination!
